text.title: Retro Format Rotation Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals from the rotation artefact to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml for retro-format-rotation-guide.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the next_format respect the no-repeat-in-3 rule AND match team state?

conclusion.verdict: BLOCK — pick a format not used in last 3
APPROVE — schedule the next retro with chosen format
skip — preconditions in Applies-If not met

text.example: Team platform; last 3 = [mad-sad-glad, 4ls, sailboat]; distribution shifted to async + Carol in PT TZ → pick anonymous-async with 96-char rationale; named owner Ruslan; quarterly cadence last 2026-05-09 → APPROVE.
